full_text:
Ren Qi 任岐
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ren Qi (任岐). Raised troops against Liu Yan but was defeated and killed. Ren Qi lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
